reason: Verified that the agent can successfully execute browser operations and retrieve page information, correctly identifying the page title as "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing the Gamut application with agent list in sidebar
Found and clicked on "QA-20260717-200048-pff2" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened and chat interface became available
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field — Message successfully entered in textbox
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, agent began processing
Waited for agent response — Agent completed work in 11 seconds, working state indicator disappeared
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is "Example Domain"."
Took screenshot documenting successful completion — Screenshot captured showing the full conversation and agent response with page title verification
